hero.title: Full-Stack Developer
hero.bio: From the precision of a sushi knife to the logic of clean code, I build dedicated and detail-oriented web applications. I'm a full-stack developer based in Montreal, currently on the Dean's List at John Abbott College.

modal.aiAnalystDesc: I have ingested the complete source code for this project. Ask me about the system architecture, database schema, or how specific features work under the hood.

chat.title: Ask AI about Codebase
chat.greeting: Hi! I'm Louis's AI assistant. Ask me anything about the architecture, code, or features of {{projectTitle}}!
chat.error: I'm having trouble connecting to the local backend. Is the Python server running?

about.title: About Me
about.p1: I started my development experience while I was employed at Taiga Motors. I worked on intricate systems as a battery assembler, where even one error may have catastrophic effects. I learned the value of following procedures and communicating clearly from this, and it has a direct impact on how I approach software architecture and teamwork.
about.p2: I am working full-time as a sushi chef and attending night classes at John Abbott. Writing clean, efficient, and error-free code is based on the same concepts I learnt when working in the kitchen: extreme precision, constancy under pressure, and a profound respect for the process.
about.p3: I've managed to combine this practical experience with my academics, where I've continuously made the Dean's List.
about.p4: When I'm not coding, you can usually find me exploring Montreal's food scene, enjoy a short gaming break or playing DnD.
